14308.alt_text: A family of four, seen from behind, stands in front of a modern house with a For Sale sign in the front yard on a cloudy day. Two adults and two children appear to be viewing the property.

14314.alt_text: An older woman smiles while holding a small dog on a couch, sitting next to an older man who is smiling and reaching for papers with charts and a smartphone on the table in front of them. Bookshelves are in the background.

14317.alt_text: A small wooden house model sits on financial documents next to a calculator and a blue pen, symbolizing real estate, mortgages, or financial planning.

14322.alt_text: A woman in business attire smiles and shakes hands with a man in an office setting, with documents and a pen on the table in front of her.

14325.alt_text: Two people stand inside a building under construction. One wears a hard hat and reflective vest, pointing toward the ceiling with a pen while discussing something with the other person, who is wearing a plaid shirt.

14328.alt_text: Three people in business attire collaborate at a desk, looking at a laptop screen displaying a Gantt chart or project timeline. One person points at the screen with a pen as they discuss the project. Sunlight streams through nearby blinds.
